capability.summary: Enrich company records using public websites and structured extraction.
repeatable_tasks: Enrich a short company list with URL, description, and confidence notes.
limitations: Does not provide legal, medical, or financial advice.

expected_effect: Records provider-side capability. Eligible external submissions may publish an unverified, non-executable, payment-disabled Service Card. This is not provider verification, fulfilment, payment, or settlement.
